time_contract.anomaly_window_definition: anomaly starts at inject_time.txt and continues until the end of the case window

file_contract.simple_metrics.csv: Per-second compact metric table used by the evaluation runner. Columns are time plus service_metric fields.
file_contract.metrics.csv: Per-second expanded metric table with raw metric names.
file_contract.logs.csv: Raw log records for the case window.
file_contract.logts.csv: RE2-SS log-template time series generated from logs.
file_contract.traces.csv: RE3-SS trace file when present; current files contain headers only.
file_contract.inject_time.txt: Unix timestamp for fault injection start.
file_contract.cluster_info.json: RE2-SS log template metadata and container mapping.
